title: Axolotl PVP+
description: Axolotl PVP+ is a lightweight, high-FPS modpack built exclusively for smooth, competitive PvP battles.
body:
Axolotl PVP+ is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed to deliver high FPS and a smooth PvP experience.

Built for competitive players, this modpack removes unnecessary clutter and focuses on speed, responsiveness, and clean visuals.

- Built in Bangladesh ⚡ | বাংলাদেশে নির্মিত
---

✅ **Version Notice**
 
### New Version Uploaded (12.0.0)


---
---

💬 **Message To You All User(s)**

## A Modpack copied this modpack called AquaWarden, beware from it.

---

**⚡ Performance Boost**  
Experience smoother gameplay with powerful optimization mods that increase FPS and reduce lag.

**🗡️ PvP Focused**  
Improved combat visibility and responsiveness to help you perform better in fights.

**🎯 Clean Interface**  
Minimal and modern UI for distraction-free gameplay.

**💻 Low-End Friendly**  
Optimized to run well on both low-end and high-end PCs.

**Included Mods:**
- Sodium – Rendering and FPS optimization  
- Low Fire – Better visibility in combat  
- Mandala's GUI (Dark Mode) – Clean UI redesign  
- Snow Operator Tab – Improved player list  
- TCDCommons API – Library support  
- TipTapShow – Better click feedback  
- VTDownloader – Utility support  

---

**Why Axolotl PVP+?**  
If you want higher FPS, smoother gameplay, and a competitive PvP advantage without unnecessary mods, this modpack is made for you.
